Title: Switch Density
Description: Lets you switch between multiple Density branches based on the contextual SwitchState. The SwitchState is a string that can be placed in the context of a Density tree using a SwitchState Density node. The default SwitchState of a Density tree is 'Default'.

Outputs.Label: SwitchCases
Outputs.Description: The possible paths to switch into based on the parent's SwitchState.
